faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: Valid category B driver's license (at least 2 years old), ID or passport.
faq.a2: A €900 deposit (to be confirmed), refundable at the end of the rental if no incidents.
faq.a3: Yes, fully comprehensive insurance is included in the base price. You can optionally reduce the excess.
faq.q4: Where is the motorhome picked up and returned?
faq.a4: In Valencia city. We offer transfer to Valencia airport as an add-on (€90).
faq.a6: 100 km/day included. Additional km: €0.30/km (to be confirmed).
faq.a7: Low season (Nov–Mar): 3 nights. Mid season (Apr–May, Oct): 4 nights. High season (Jun–Sep): 5 nights.
faq.a8: We accept card, Bizum and bank transfer.

contact.title: Contact us

contact.soon_desc: For now, drop us a WhatsApp message and we confirm availability in minutes.

cancellationPolicy.title: Cancellation Policy
cancellationPolicy.intro: We know plans change. Here's exactly what happens if you need to cancel your booking.
cancellationPolicy.tier1_body: If you cancel within 24 hours of making your booking, and your trip start date is more than 48 hours away, you'll receive a 100% refund of your deposit.
cancellationPolicy.tier2_body: Cancellations made 30 or more days before your start date are refunded 95% of the deposit.
cancellationPolicy.tier3_title: Cancel less than 30 days before departure
cancellationPolicy.tier3_body: Cancellations made less than 30 days before your start date are not eligible for a deposit refund. Your booking will still be cancelled and the dates released — we will not attempt to charge the remaining balance.
cancellationPolicy.tier4_body: Exceptional circumstances (medical emergencies, natural disasters, etc.) are handled on a case-by-case basis. Please contact us directly.

cancelBooking.title: Cancel Your Booking
cancelBooking.intro: Enter your booking reference and last name, or your email and last name, to look up your reservation.
cancelBooking.form_required: Enter your booking reference or email, plus your last name
cancelBooking.error_not_found: No matching booking found. Double-check your reference or details.
cancelBooking.error_ambiguous: We found multiple bookings for that email. Please use your booking reference instead.
cancelBooking.error_already_cancelled: This booking has already been cancelled.
cancelBooking.error_refund_failed: We couldn't process the refund right now. Please try again or contact us.
cancelBooking.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
cancelBooking.quote_refund_full: You will be refunded {{pct}}% (€{{amount}}) of your deposit.
cancelBooking.quote_refund_zero: Your deposit is non-refundable at this stage, but your booking will be cancelled and the dates released.
cancelBooking.done_body: Your booking has been cancelled. A confirmation email is on its way — refunds typically arrive within 5–10 business days.
